description: An IT Systems Manager is preparing OpManager for a formal SOC2 compliance audit. A corporate compliance checklist has been placed on your desktop at ~/Desktop/compliance_rollout_checklist.txt. Review the checklist and apply the required corporate branding and security hardening policies in OpManager. You must configure the application Rebranding and Security Settings to meet the organizational identity and access control standards specified. Credentials: admin / Admin@123 at http://localhost:8060.
